name: Luftman, Heck & Associates LLP: Jeremiah Heck
description_short: Luftman, Heck & Associates LLP: Jeremiah Heck is a credit repair provider based in Dublin, Ohio. Rated 5.0/5 on Google.
description_long:
Luftman, Heck & Associates LLP: Jeremiah Heck is a credit repair provider serving clients in Dublin, Ohio. The company serves consumers in the Dublin area who are looking to repair and improve their credit scores.

Operating as a bankruptcy attorney, civil law attorney, law firm, Luftman, Heck & Associates LLP: Jeremiah Heck provides a range of services for consumers seeking credit repair solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in Dublin, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Luftman, Heck & Associates LLP: Jeremiah Heck operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Dublin, Ohio area who are considering Luftman, Heck & Associates LLP: Jeremiah Heck should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
